subcodes.first_line: O conqueror in the name of Bahá! Thy missive hath been received and, like unto a chalice of pure wine, brought joy. Render thou praise unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای فتح بها رق منشورت وصول یافت و چون کاس طهور مورث سرور شد حمد کن خدا را که
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @love of God, @love as fire, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @being a source of light; guidance, @firmness in the Covenant
